name: Radarr Upcoming
description: Fetches the Wanted (monitored, not-yet-downloaded) movie list from your Radarr instance and exposes it through a Jellyfin REST API so it can be displayed as an Upcoming section on the home page. Configure the plugin with your Radarr URL and API key under Dashboard → Plugins.
overview: Shows your Radarr Wanted list as an Upcoming section in Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Adds stub file generation: the plugin now writes one .strm + .nfo file per Radarr wanted movie into a configurable folder on disk. Point Jellyfin at that folder as a new Movies library and the upcoming movies appear on the home page with metadata and posters — even before they are downloaded.

Adds a "Radarr Upcoming" Jellyfin collection that is automatically kept in sync with the Radarr Wanted list. Movies from Radarr that already exist in the Jellyfin library are added to (or removed from) the collection on each hourly sync, so the collection appears natively on the Jellyfin home page under Collections.
Initial release. Fetches Radarr Wanted list and exposes it via /RadarrUpcoming/upcoming. Includes an hourly scheduled sync task and a plugin configuration page.
